tips.subject: Mathematics
tips.title: Factorising Quadratics
tips.content: For ax² + bx + c = 0: Find two numbers that multiply to ac and add to b. Then split the middle term and group.

tips.subject: Mathematics
tips.title: Differentiation Rules
tips.content: Power rule: d/dx(xⁿ) = nxⁿ⁻¹. Product rule: (fg)' = f'g + fg'. Quotient rule: (f/g)' = (f'g - fg')/g²

tips.subject: Mathematics
tips.title: Integration Rules
tips.content: Power rule: ∫xⁿ dx = xⁿ⁺¹/(n+1) + C. Always add +C for indefinite integrals.

tips.subject: Mathematics
tips.title: Arithmetic vs Geometric
tips.content: Arithmetic: constant difference (d). Geometric: constant ratio (r). Tₙ = a + (n-1)d or Tₙ = arⁿ⁻¹

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Newton's Second Law
tips.content: F = ma. Force equals mass times acceleration. Units: N = kg·m/s². Always draw a free body diagram!

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Coulomb's Law
tips.content: Force between two charges: proportional to product of charges, inversely proportional to square of distance.

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Ohm's Law & Kirchhoff's
tips.content: V = IR (Ohm's Law). Series: I same, V adds. Parallel: V same, I adds. KCL: ΣI_in = ΣI_out

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Wave Equation
tips.content: v = fλ. Speed = frequency × wavelength. For sound: v = 340 m/s in air. For light: c = 3×10⁸ m/s

tips.subject: Physical Sciences
tips.title: Functional Groups
tips.content: Alkanes: C-C single. Alkenes: C=C double. Alcohols: -OH. Carboxylic acids: -COOH. Esters: -COO-.

tips.subject: Life Sciences
tips.title: Mitosis vs Meiosis
tips.content: Mitosis: 2 identical cells, same chromosome number. Meiosis: 4 different cells, half chromosome number.

tips.subject: Life Sciences
tips.title: Punnett Squares
tips.content: Cross parents' alleles to find offspring ratios. Dominant always masks recessive. Use letter pairs (Tt × Tt → 3:1)

tips.subject: Life Sciences
tips.title: Natural Selection
tips.content: Variation exists in populations. Individuals with advantageous traits survive and reproduce more (survival of the fittest).

tips.subject: English
tips.title: PQE Method
tips.content: Point: State your argument. Quote: Provide evidence from text. Explanation: Explain how it supports your point.

tips.subject: English
tips.title: Literary Devices
tips.content: Metaphor: direct comparison. Simile: comparison using like/as. Foreshadowing: hints about future events. Irony: when reality contradicts expectations.

tips.subject: English
tips.title: Reading Strategy
tips.content: Read questions first, then scan text for keywords. Focus on first and last sentences of paragraphs.

tips.subject: History
tips.title: Essay Structure
tips.content: Introduction (context + argument), Body (topic sentences + evidence), Conclusion (restate argument + significance).

tips.subject: History
tips.title: Soweto 1976
tips.content: June 16, 1976 - Student protests against Afrikaans medium policy. Hector Pieterson killed. Sparked international awareness.
